sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّبَابُ مَوَاقِعَ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladi ljudi svakodnevno koriste društvene mreže.
sentences.translationEn: Young people use social media sites every day.

sentences.arabic: هُمْ يَنْشُرُونَ صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً لِرِحْلَاتِهِمْ وَأَنْشِطَتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Oni objavljuju lijepe fotografije sa svojih putovanja i aktivnosti.
sentences.translationEn: They post beautiful photos of their trips and activities.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ التَّعْلِيقَ عَلَى الصُّوَرِ وَمُشَارَكَتَهَا مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole komentarisati fotografije i dijeliti ih s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: People like commenting on photos and sharing them with friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَوَاقِعُ فِي تَقْوِيَةِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ove stranice pomažu u jačanju odnosa među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: These sites help in strengthening relationships between people.
